title: rosa communis var. flexibilis
intro: Rosa communis var. flexibilis, also known as the wild rose or dog rose, is a fragrant and adaptable plant species of the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rosa communis var. flexibilis include its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Rosa communis var. flexibilis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote relaxation, soothe skin irritations, and support overall well-being.
